articles.title: US, China officials reportedly set to meet to lay the groundwork ahead of Trump-Xi summit
articles.snippet: With all that is happening in the Middle East, let's not forget that there is also an ongoing trade war between the US and the rest of the world. The Supreme Court shooting down Trump's reciprocal tariffs has changed the landscape here dramatically. And that is making for a bit of an awkward setting ahead of Trump's visit to Beijing at the end of this month.The latest news via Bloomberg is saying that US and China trade negotiators will be scheduling to meet some time in mid-March. That suggests

articles.title: China sees higher platform tax compliance after new reporting framework

combined_text:
[0.33] US, China officials reportedly set to meet to lay the groundwork ahead of Trump-Xi summit
With all that is happening in the Middle East, let's not forget that there is also an ongoing trade war between the US and the rest of the world. The Supreme Court shooting down Trump's reciprocal tariffs has changed the landscape here dramatically. And that is making for a bit of an awkward setting ahead of Trump's visit to Beijing at the end of this month.The latest news via Bloomberg is saying that US and China trade negotiators will be scheduling to meet some time in mid-March. That suggests

[0.33] China sees higher platform tax compliance after new reporting framework
